title: P5-03 Data-protection-relevant headers module (no regulatory verbs — R2)
acceptance_criteria: Re-interpret crawl.headers for HSTS, Content-Security-Policy, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, X-Content-Type-Options as data-protection-relevant signals

R2 CONSTRAINT: NO regulatory verb framing — do NOT say 'GDPR Art. 32 non-compliant' or assert legal status. Plain wording: 'data-protection-relevant header not set'. Regulation name may appear once as neutral context at most
Factual signal findings only; no score; no verdict; moduleId 'P5-03', category 'Data Protection'
Pure function over crawl.headers — NO new outbound request; no dependency on p1-03 internals (read crawl.headers directly)
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
